title: A Funny Game Where Comedians Try Not to Laugh
summary: This article is about a TV show called Last One Laughing. In this show, comedians like Maisie Adam try to make others laugh while keeping a straight face. They are in a room with nine other comedians for six hours. If they laugh once, they get a yellow card from host Jimmy Carr. If they laugh twice, they get a red card and are out of the game. Maisie says it feels like being in school where friends try to make you laugh. She was nervous about facing Bob Mortimer, who won the first season. The show is on Prime Video and is popular in British comedy. It is hard not to laugh when others are being funny.

background_read: Last One Laughing is a comedy game show where comedians compete by trying not to laugh. It is popular on TV and streaming services like Prime Video. Comedians like Maisie Adam share their experiences, making it fun for viewers. The show helps people learn about humor and how hard it is to stay serious when others are funny.
Article_Structure: WHO: Comedians like Maisie Adam and host Jimmy Carr
WHAT: A TV show where comedians try not to laugh while making others laugh
WHERE: On Prime Video and in a room with other comedians
WHY: To entertain people and show the challenge of staying serious in comedy

perspectives.description: The show is fun to watch and makes people laugh.
